description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular fuselage painted in a green and gray camouflage pattern, featuring red star insignias on the wings and tail. The airplane has a pointed nose cone, a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front, and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. Its wings are swept back with multiple hardpoints carrying missiles and ordnance, and the undercarriage includes a tricycle landing gear configuration. The rear of the aircraft houses two large jet engine exhausts, indicating a twin-engine setup. The surface appears metallic with a matte finish, and the overall design is optimized for speed and maneuverability. The aircraft is detailed with visible panel lines, control surfaces, and various access hatches.
description: A camouflaged military jet with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and twin rear jet engines, equipped with missiles and a bubble canopy cockpit.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, swept wings with missiles, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the twin jet exhausts, vertical stabilizers, and the camouflage pattern on the upper surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the twin engines, tail section, and the ordnance mounted under the wings.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the cockpit, nose cone, wing-mounted missiles, and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with multiple hardpoints for ordnance; no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose gear and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely multi-seat with prominent front visibility.
